Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Netherworld Empress]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — The Netherworld Empress has dark hair and eyes that shine like cruel amethyst stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — The Netherworld Empress wears a crown of silver and elaborate ceremonial robes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — The Netherworld Empress wields a black bow of darkness and has a spear at her side.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — The Netherworld Empress's spiritual pressure weighs Mercy down.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — The spirit of the Netherworld Empress reflects the Shadow Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — The Netherworld Empress wears the nobility of the Crown Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — The body of the Netherworld Empress carries the Strength Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — The Netherworld Empress has the sight of the Bow Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — The Netherworld Empress flashed behind Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — The Netherworld Empress was the embodiment of Malice's ideals.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Mercy can summon a projection of the Netherworld Empress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — The projection of the Netherworld Empress carries a spear and is clothed in black, white, and violet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — The Netherworld Empress uses a bow that transforms into a spear.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
